title: polyscias stonei
intro: Polyscias stonei, also known as the Stone's Polyscias or Stone's Faux Holly, is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Polyscias stonei include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, Polyscias stonei is typically used in the form of a tincture or infusion, and can also be used to make a topical cream or salve for skin conditions.
